annotation_target.structure: Middle section atmospheric consequent — shimmering ripples, coloristic resolution
teaching_goals: the ripple texture is continuous and never mechanical
each harmonic color has its own quality — hear them
style_tips: the ripples are like reflections on water — never still

teaching_notes.note: The phrase settles but the ripples continue — no break in the flow.
technique: seamless legato through the phrase boundary

target_trace.objective: Read mm. 35–38 of Clair de Lune (Suite bergamasque, III) (continuation of mm. 31–34), analyze the musical continuation, play in a loop.

session.content: Play measures 35–38 and describe the continuation.
Let me view the piano roll for mm. 35–38.
Measures 35–38 continue the middle section's flowing character — the ripples continue with coloristic harmonic changes. The mood is one of shimmering movement. Let me loop mm. 35–38.
Clair de Lune mm. 35–38: middle section continuation, shimmering ripples, coloristic harmonics. Pairs with mm. 31–34.

eval_metadata.split_strategy: stratified by (composer, composition_id) with MIDI byte-hash dedup
